requirement_topic.en: EMC Emissions — INDECOPI NTP-Harmonised Standards (NTP-IEC / CISPR)
requirement_topic.zh: EMC辐射发射——INDECOPI NTP协调标准（NTP-IEC / CISPR）
requirement_topic.zht: EMC輻射發射——INDECOPI NTP協調標準（NTP-IEC / CISPR）

summary.en: Peru adopts international IEC and CISPR standards through INDECOPI (Instituto Nacional de Defensa de la Competencia y de la Protección de la Propiedad Intelectual), which publishes corresponding NTP (Norma Técnica Peruana) harmonised standards. For multimedia and information-technology equipment — the primary category covering Wi-Fi routers, smart speakers, and similar IoT devices — the applicable emissions standard is harmonised with CISPR 32 (electromagnetic compatibility of multimedia equipment, emissions requirements). EMC emissions compliance documentation is expected as part of the MTC homologación application dossier; testing must be conducted by a laboratory recognised under the Peruvian homologación framework. Peru does not operate a CE-style EMC self-declaration scheme; EMC is evaluated within the MTC/DGAT type-approval process rather than through a standalone market-surveillance declaration.
summary.zh: 秘鲁通过INDECOPI（国家竞争和知识产权保护研究所）采用国际IEC和CISPR标准，并发布相应的NTP（秘鲁技术标准）协调标准。对于多媒体和信息技术设备——Wi-Fi路由器、智能音箱及类似物联网设备的主要类别——适用的发射标准与CISPR 32（多媒体设备电磁兼容，发射要求）协调。EMC发射合规文件作为MTC均质化认证申请材料的一部分；检测须由秘鲁均质化认证框架下认可的实验室进行。秘鲁不采用类似CE的EMC自声明方案；EMC在MTC/DGAT型号认证程序内评估，而非通过独立的市场监督声明。
summary.zht: 秘魯通過INDECOPI（國家競爭和知識產權保護研究所）採用國際IEC和CISPR標準，並發布相應的NTP（秘魯技術標準）協調標準。對於多媒體和資訊技術設備——Wi-Fi路由器、智慧音箱及類似物聯網裝置的主要類別——適用的發射標準與CISPR 32（多媒體設備電磁相容，發射要求）協調。EMC發射合規文件作為MTC均質化認證申請材料的一部分；檢測須由秘魯均質化認證框架下認可的實驗室進行。秘魯不採用類似CE的EMC自聲明方案；EMC在MTC/DGAT型號認證程序內評估，而非通過獨立的市場監督聲明。

standards_or_laws: NTP (Norma Técnica Peruana) harmonised with CISPR 32 — electromagnetic compatibility of multimedia equipment, emissions requirements, as adopted by INDECOPI
INDECOPI — Instituto Nacional de Defensa de la Competencia y de la Protección de la Propiedad Intelectual — Peruvian standards body publishing NTP harmonised standards
MTC/DGAT homologación process — EMC emissions testing assessed as part of type approval dossier

summary.en: In China, EMC emissions compliance for information technology and multimedia equipment is governed primarily by GB/T 9254 (harmonising CISPR 22 / CISPR 32) for Class A and Class B radiated and conducted emissions, and by GB 17625.1 (harmonising IEC 61000-3-2) for harmonic current emissions. GB/T 9254 compliance is assessed as part of the CCC process for in-scope products and as a voluntary standard requirement for others. Chinese GB EMC standards are technically aligned with CISPR but are not accepted by MTC/DGAT as equivalent to NTP-harmonised CISPR 32 testing; separate testing is required for the Peruvian homologación dossier.
summary.zh: 在中国，信息技术和多媒体设备的EMC辐射发射合规主要受GB/T 9254（对应CISPR 22 / CISPR 32）约束，适用A级和B级辐射及传导发射限值；谐波电流发射则受GB 17625.1（对应IEC 61000-3-2）约束。GB/T 9254合规作为范围内产品CCC程序的一部分进行评估，对其他产品则作为自愿性标准要求。中国GB EMC标准在技术上与CISPR一致，但不被MTC/DGAT接受为等同于NTP协调CISPR 32检测；秘鲁均质化认证材料须进行单独检测。
summary.zht: 在中國，資訊技術和多媒體設備的EMC輻射發射合規主要受GB/T 9254（對應CISPR 22 / CISPR 32）約束，適用A級和B級輻射及傳導發射限值；諧波電流發射則受GB 17625.1（對應IEC 61000-3-2）約束。GB/T 9254合規作為範圍內產品CCC程序的一部分進行評估，對其他產品則作為自願性標準要求。中國GB EMC標準在技術上與CISPR一致，但不被MTC/DGAT接受為等同於NTP協調CISPR 32檢測；秘魯均質化認證材料須進行單獨檢測。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 9254 (harmonises CISPR 22/32) — EMC emissions limits for information technology and multimedia equipment in China
GB 17625.1 (harmonises IEC 61000-3-2) — harmonic current emission limits in China
CCC (China Compulsory Certification) — includes EMC testing for certain in-scope product categories

gap.en: Chinese GB/T 9254 EMC emissions test reports and CCC certification are not accepted by MTC/DGAT as satisfying NTP-harmonised CISPR 32 requirements in Peru. EMC emissions testing must be conducted afresh under NTP/CISPR-aligned standards by a laboratory recognised under the Peruvian homologación framework, as part of the MTC/DGAT type-approval dossier. No mutual recognition or test-report equivalence pathway exists between Peru and China, or between Peru and CE-mark countries, for EMC emissions testing.
gap.zh: 中国GB/T 9254 EMC发射检测报告和CCC认证不被MTC/DGAT接受为满足秘鲁NTP协调CISPR 32要求。作为MTC/DGAT型号认证材料的一部分，须由秘鲁均质化认证框架下认可的实验室按NTP/CISPR协调标准重新进行EMC发射检测。秘鲁与中国之间，以及秘鲁与CE标志国家之间，均无EMC发射检测的相互认可或检测报告等效路径。
gap.zht: 中國GB/T 9254 EMC發射檢測報告和CCC認證不被MTC/DGAT接受為滿足秘魯NTP協調CISPR 32要求。作為MTC/DGAT型號認證材料的一部分，須由秘魯均質化認證框架下認可的實驗室按NTP/CISPR協調標準重新進行EMC發射檢測。秘魯與中國之間，以及秘魯與CE標誌國家之間，均無EMC發射檢測的相互認可或檢測報告等效路徑。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — EMC emissions compliance to NTP-harmonised CISPR 32 assessed as part of MTC/DGAT homologación dossier; no standalone self-declaration pathway in Peru
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for in-scope CCC products; voluntary/recommended for others — GB/T 9254 governs EMC emissions in China

source.publisher: INDECOPI — Instituto Nacional de Defensa de la Competencia y de la Protección de la Propiedad Intelectual (Peru)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Peru harmonises CISPR 32 EMC emissions requirements through NTP standards published by INDECOPI, evaluated within the MTC/DGAT homologación dossier by an MTC-recognised laboratory. Chinese GB/T 9254 test reports and CCC records are not accepted as equivalent. No CE-style EMC self-declaration pathway is available in Peru. Verify applicable NTP standard editions and EMC testing scope with a qualified Peruvian regulatory professional before engaging a laboratory.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 秘鲁通过INDECOPI发布的NTP标准协调CISPR 32 EMC发射要求，由MTC认可的实验室在MTC/DGAT均质化认证材料内进行评估。中国GB/T 9254检测报告和CCC记录不被视为等效。秘鲁无类似CE的EMC自声明路径。在委托实验室之前，请向合格的秘鲁监管专业人士核验适用的NTP标准版本和EMC检测范围。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 秘魯通過INDECOPI發布的NTP標準協調CISPR 32 EMC發射要求，由MTC認可的實驗室在MTC/DGAT均質化認證材料內進行評估。中國GB/T 9254檢測報告和CCC記錄不被視為等效。秘魯無類似CE的EMC自聲明路徑。在委託實驗室之前，請向合格的秘魯監管專業人士核驗適用的NTP標準版本和EMC檢測範圍。

requirement_topic.en: EMC Immunity — INDECOPI NTP-Harmonised IEC 61000 Series

summary.en: For equipment sold in Peru, EMC immunity requirements follow NTP standards harmonised with IEC 61000 series (IEC 61000-4-x), as published by INDECOPI, covering immunity to electrostatic discharge (ESD), electrical fast transients, surge, conducted and radiated RF immunity, power frequency magnetic field, and voltage dips and interruptions. Immunity testing is conducted as part of the MTC/DGAT homologación dossier by an MTC-recognised accredited laboratory. Peru does not operate a separate CE-style immunity self-declaration; immunity compliance is embedded within the MTC/DGAT type-approval evaluation. The unusual 220V/60Hz supply characteristic must be accounted for in immunity test condition selection.
summary.zh: 在秘鲁销售的设备，EMC抗扰度要求遵循INDECOPI发布的与IEC 61000系列（IEC 61000-4-x）协调的NTP标准，涵盖对静电放电（ESD）、电快速瞬变脉冲群、浪涌、传导和辐射射频抗扰度、工频磁场以及电压暂降和中断的抗扰度。抗扰度检测由MTC认可的认可实验室作为MTC/DGAT均质化认证材料的一部分进行。秘鲁不实行单独的类似CE的抗扰度自声明；抗扰度合规嵌入MTC/DGAT型号认证评估中。选择抗扰度测试条件时须考虑220V/60Hz这一不寻常的电源特性。
summary.zht: 在秘魯銷售的設備，EMC抗擾度要求遵循INDECOPI發布的與IEC 61000系列（IEC 61000-4-x）協調的NTP標準，涵蓋對靜電放電（ESD）、電快速暫態脈衝群、突波、傳導和輻射射頻抗擾度、工頻磁場以及電壓暫降和中斷的抗擾度。抗擾度檢測由MTC認可的認可實驗室作為MTC/DGAT均質化認證材料的一部分進行。秘魯不實行單獨的類似CE的抗擾度自聲明；抗擾度合規嵌入MTC/DGAT型號認證評估中。選擇抗擾度測試條件時須考慮220V/60Hz這一不尋常的電源特性。

standards_or_laws: NTP harmonised with IEC 61000-4 series — EMC immunity test methods in Peru, as published by INDECOPI
IEC 61000-6-1 / IEC 61000-6-3 — generic immunity standards for residential and light-industrial environments (referenced via NTP harmonisation)
MTC/DGAT homologación process — immunity compliance evaluated as part of Peruvian type approval by MTC-recognised laboratory

summary.en: In China, EMC immunity requirements for information technology and multimedia equipment are governed by GB/T 17626 series (harmonising IEC 61000-4-x), covering ESD, electrical fast transients, surge, and RF immunity. GB/T 17626 immunity compliance is typically assessed as part of CCC for in-scope products and as a recommended or voluntary requirement for others. GB/T 17626 is technically aligned with IEC 61000-4 but Chinese test reports and CCC records are not accepted by MTC/DGAT as satisfying Peruvian NTP-harmonised IEC 61000-series requirements.
summary.zh: 在中国，信息技术和多媒体设备的EMC抗扰度要求受GB/T 17626系列（对应IEC 61000-4-x）约束，涵盖ESD、电快速瞬变脉冲群、浪涌和射频抗扰度。GB/T 17626抗扰度合规通常作为范围内产品CCC程序的一部分进行评估，对其他产品则作为推荐/自愿要求。GB/T 17626在技术上与IEC 61000-4一致，但中国检测报告和CCC记录不被MTC/DGAT接受为满足秘鲁NTP协调IEC 61000系列要求。
summary.zht: 在中國，資訊技術和多媒體設備的EMC抗擾度要求受GB/T 17626系列（對應IEC 61000-4-x）約束，涵蓋ESD、電快速暫態脈衝群、突波和射頻抗擾度。GB/T 17626抗擾度合規通常作為範圍內產品CCC程序的一部分進行評估，對其他產品則作為建議/自願要求。GB/T 17626在技術上與IEC 61000-4一致，但中國檢測報告和CCC記錄不被MTC/DGAT接受為滿足秘魯NTP協調IEC 61000系列要求。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 17626 series (harmonises IEC 61000-4-x) — EMC immunity test methods in China
CCC (China Compulsory Certification) — includes immunity testing for certain in-scope product categories

gap.en: Chinese GB/T 17626 EMC immunity test reports are not accepted by MTC/DGAT as equivalent to NTP-harmonised IEC 61000-series testing in Peru. Immunity must be re-tested under NTP/IEC 61000-4-x-aligned standards by an MTC-recognised laboratory as part of the Peruvian homologación dossier. No mutual recognition or report-sharing pathway exists between Peru and China for EMC immunity. Peru's 220V/60Hz supply — distinct from both China's 220V/50Hz and North America's 110V/60Hz — affects surge and electrical-fast-transient test conditions and must be confirmed with the testing laboratory.
gap.zh: 中国GB/T 17626 EMC抗扰度检测报告不被MTC/DGAT接受为与秘鲁NTP协调IEC 61000系列检测等效。须由MTC认可的实验室按NTP/IEC 61000-4-x协调标准重新进行抗扰度检测，作为秘鲁均质化认证材料的一部分。秘鲁与中国之间不存在EMC抗扰度的相互认可或报告共享路径。秘鲁220V/60Hz电源——有别于中国220V/50Hz和北美110V/60Hz——影响浪涌和电快速瞬变脉冲群测试条件，须与检测实验室确认。
gap.zht: 中國GB/T 17626 EMC抗擾度檢測報告不被MTC/DGAT接受為與秘魯NTP協調IEC 61000系列檢測等效。須由MTC認可的實驗室按NTP/IEC 61000-4-x協調標準重新進行抗擾度檢測，作為秘魯均質化認證材料的一部分。秘魯與中國之間不存在EMC抗擾度的相互認可或報告共享路徑。秘魯220V/60Hz電源——有別於中國220V/50Hz和北美110V/60Hz——影響突波和電快速暫態脈衝群測試條件，須與檢測實驗室確認。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — EMC immunity to NTP-harmonised IEC 61000-4 series assessed as part of MTC/DGAT homologación dossier; no standalone self-declaration pathway in Peru
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for in-scope CCC products; voluntary/recommended for others — GB/T 17626 governs EMC immunity in China

source.publisher: INDECOPI — Instituto Nacional de Defensa de la Competencia y de la Protección de la Propiedad Intelectual (Peru)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Peru assesses EMC immunity to NTP-harmonised IEC 61000-4 series within the MTC/DGAT homologación process; no standalone immunity self-declaration exists. Chinese GB/T 17626 test reports and CCC records are not accepted as equivalent. Immunity test conditions must account for Peru's distinctive 220V/60Hz supply. Verify applicable NTP IEC 61000-series standard editions and immunity test scope with a qualified Peruvian regulatory professional before engaging a laboratory.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 秘鲁在MTC/DGAT均质化认证程序内按NTP协调IEC 61000-4系列评估EMC抗扰度；不存在单独的抗扰度自声明机制。中国GB/T 17626检测报告和CCC记录不被视为等效。抗扰度测试条件须考虑秘鲁独特的220V/60Hz电源。在委托实验室之前，请向合格的秘鲁监管专业人士核验适用的NTP IEC 61000系列标准版本和抗扰度检测范围。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 秘魯在MTC/DGAT均質化認證程序內按NTP協調IEC 61000-4系列評估EMC抗擾度；不存在單獨的抗擾度自聲明機制。中國GB/T 17626檢測報告和CCC記錄不被視為等效。抗擾度測試條件須考慮秘魯獨特的220V/60Hz電源。在委託實驗室之前，請向合格的秘魯監管專業人士核驗適用的NTP IEC 61000系列標準版本和抗擾度檢測範圍。
